overview: Premium 3D animated website for Medhavi Physics Classes by Er. Pooja Verma. Features a photo gallery, physics tips, admission info, and full course listings for Class 11, 12, NEET, and JEE.
features: Gallery page with all 9 photos and lightbox viewer
Admission Process page with step-by-step guide
Multi-page SPA with dark navy + gold + cyan theme
